rationale.R1.6: The agent's revisions significantly improved the writing polish, breaking up run-on sentences and tightening phrasing.
rationale.RX.1: The output does not disclose uncertainty or confidence in its claims, presenting all information as equally confident.
rationale.RX.3: The revised text adheres to the original scope, covering the same topics and ideas without introducing new ones.
rationale.RX.4: The agent's revisions did not introduce any new errors, fabrications, or harmful content, maintaining a harm-free output.
rationale.RX.5: The agent does not provide provenance or traceability for its changes, making it difficult to identify the sources of the revised text.
